task_completion.description: Verify the SRS (Software Requirements Specification) document is open in ReqView.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application window is visible, and the active document tab or title indicates 'SRS'.

task_completion.description: Verify a new requirement has been added at the end of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new requirement row or block is visible at the very bottom of the SRS document's requirement list.

task_completion.description: Verify the text of the new requirement matches the requested description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text field of the newly added requirement contains 'The system shall automatically log all authentication failures...' or at least the substring 'log all authentication failures'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Status' attribute of the new requirement is set to 'Draft'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the attributes column or properties pane for the new requirement, the 'Status' field displays 'Draft'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Priority' attribute of the new requirement is set to 'High'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the attributes column or properties pane for the new requirement, the 'Priority' field displays 'High'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the ReqView graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ReqView application interface being used, rather than a terminal window or script editor modifying the SRS.json file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the changes were made in the actual ReqView application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window shows standard ReqView UI elements (menus, toolbars, document tree) and not a generic text editor or web browser.

integrity.description: Verify the rest of the SRS document was not deleted or corrupted.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other existing requirements in the SRS document are still visible above the newly added requirement.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target document: 'SRS'. Required text substring to verify: 'log all authentication failures'. Required Status attribute: 'Draft'. Required Priority attribute: 'High'.
